query:
SELECT e.id, e.evse_id_local, e.connector_id, e.status, e.connector_type, e.power_kw, cs.name as station_name, cs.ocpp_identity 
FROM evses e 
JOIN charging_stations cs ON e.station_id = cs.id 
LIMIT 10;
